name: British Defender 3D2N
description: Embark on an exhilarating 3-day, 2-night sailing adventure aboard the British Defender, a sleek and stylish maxi-yacht. Designed for the young and adventurous, this tour is perfect for backpackers and solo travelers looking to explore the Whitsundays in a fun and social setting. Experience the thrill of sailing on a racing yacht while visiting iconic locations like Whitehaven Beach and Hill Inlet. With plenty of opportunities for snorkeling and exploring the vibrant marine life of the Great Barrier Reef, this tour promises an unforgettable journey through paradise.
departure_location: Meeting Point C, Coral Sea Marina, Airlie Beach
departure_times: Departs: 9:00am - Thu, Sun | Returns: 4:00pm - Sat, Tues
includes:
All meals included and made fresh on board
Clean, fresh linen provided for all guests
Refreshments, tea and coffee provided
Marine Park fees
Wet weather jackets if needed
BYO alcohol (no glass). Soft drinks available for purchase on board
highlights:
Sociable atmosphere with up to 26 passengers
Snorkel at two different fringe reefs
Visit Whitehaven Beach and Hill Inlet
Experience a fun and authentic maxi sailing adventure
Spacious 77ft long yacht with open plan deck
Shaded area on deck for protection from the sun
price_tiers: Adult (SALE - Shared Accommodation, 10 Dec 2025 - 28 Feb 2026): A$699 | Adult (Shared Accommodation, 10 Dec 2025 - 30 Apr 2026): A$739
locations: Airlie Beach,Great Barrier Reef,Hill Inlet,Whitehaven,Whitsunday Island
itinerary:
**Day 1:**
- Morning Tea: Biscuits, tea, coffee and Milo
- Lunch: BBQ burgers with freshly prepared salads
- Afternoon Tea: Antipasto platter
- Dinner: Bangers and mash with crusty bread and fresh garden salad
**Day 2:**
- Breakfast: Selection of cereals, yoghurt, bread, croissants and spreads, fresh fruit, tea, coffee and Milo
- Morning Tea: Cake, tea, coffee and Milo
- Lunch: Beef burritos with salads
- Afternoon Tea: Nachos
- Dinner: Tortellini with garlic bread and salad

- Breakfast: Selection of cereals, yoghurt, bread, pancakes and spreads, fresh fruit, tea, coffee and Milo
- Morning Tea: Biscuits, tea, coffee and Milo
- Lunch: Selection of cold deli meats, fresh salad and wraps
